title: No HFD Load Popups
description: A patch for my other packs that disables the "Loaded succesfully!" chat message.
body:
Disables the "Loaded succesfully!" chat pop-ups that appear when using my packs. Great for when you have a lot installed and the pop-ups get overbearing.

If the pop-ups still appear, disable the datapack and then run the command:

```
/datapack enable "[NLP]" last
```


Supports:
- [Simple Apple Trees](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-apple-trees)
- [happyfied's Reimagined Crafting](https://modrinth.com/datapack/reimagined-crafting)
- [The Grinding Table](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-grinding-table)
- [The Grinding Table - Biomass Addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tgt-biomass)
- [Icyclo](https://modrinth.com/datapack/icyclo)
